validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_golden_regression.py
validation_results.summary: Golden suite reports are deterministic, self-hash-valid, detect output drift, block update requests without rewriting expected outputs, and reject invalid hash shapes.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_integration_end_to_end.py
validation_results.summary: Integration suite requires CLI, adapters, program driver, recovery, Human Gate, lock gate, and write scope evidence, blocks bypasses, and rejects non-machine-readable payload shapes.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_release_readiness.py
validation_results.summary: Release suite report shape requires package dry-run, example smoke, migration coverage, and release readiness evidence hashes while refusing publish, release-lock, and invalid evidence hash actions.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository python -m drd_harness.cli.main runtime-boundary-check repository/src
validation_results.summary: Runtime source has no construction authority imports or direct construction authority path reads.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests
